quotes.text: The best time to start a business was yesterday. The second best time is now. The worst time is 'when the market is ready.'
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Nobody cares about your startup. They care about their problem. If your startup solves it, they'll care about you.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every business plan is fiction until the first customer pays. Then it's a hypothesis.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Bootstrapping isn't about being cheap. It's about being forced to find product-market fit before you run out of runway.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Raising money is easy. Building something people want is hard. Most founders get these confused.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every successful business is a bet that the world is different than most people think.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The lean startup method is just the scientific method for people who failed biology.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: First principles thinking sounds profound until you realize it's just 'ask why' without the philosophy degree.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best exit strategy is the one you don't need because the business is printing money.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The biggest risk is not taking any risk. In a world that is changing really quickly, the only strategy that is guaranteed to fail is not taking risks.
quotes.author: Mark Zuckerberg

quotes.text: Fail fast, fail forward, fail cheaply. But most importantly: learn.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The graveyard of failed startups is filled with products nobody asked for, built by people who didn't listen.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: If your business can't survive without you, you don't have a business. You have a job.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: You don't need permission to start. You don't need a co-founder to start. You don't need funding to start. You need to start.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best validation is someone giving you money. Everything else — surveys, waitlists, likes — is just flirting.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best businesses are built on one simple insight: 'This could be so much better.' Execute that insight.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every successful entrepreneur has a story that starts with 'I had no idea what I was doing.'
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to start a business is when you're young and have nothing to lose. The second best time is when you're experienced and have something to build with.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best businesses are built on obsession, not inspiration. Inspiration fades. Obsession endures.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best entrepreneurs are the ones who can hold two contradictory ideas in their head and still act.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every business starts with one person who decided to stop asking for permission.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The hardest part of being your own boss is that your boss is an asshole who never lets you rest.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to quit your job is when you have 6 months of runway. Not when you're fed up. Not when you're rich.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your business should make money while you sleep. If it doesn't, you haven't built a business — you've built a job.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best entrepreneurs are the ones who can fail gracefully and come back stronger.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Entrepreneurship is living a few years of your life like most people won't, so you can spend the rest like most people can't.
quotes.author: Warren Tracy

quotes.text: The best entrepreneurs are the ones who can see opportunities where others see problems.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your first startup will probably fail. Your second might too. Your third might be the one.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Entrepreneurship is not a job. It's a lifestyle. Choose it intentionally.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your startup is a bet on yourself. Bet big.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best entrepreneurs are the ones who can make decisions with incomplete information.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your startup's biggest asset is your ability to learn faster than your competitors.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to start is now. Not when you're ready. You'll never be ready.
quotes.author: based
